events.title: Group Meeting: Nanosheet Assembly Progress
events.description: Weekly meeting to discuss synthesis progress, troubleshoot sonication parameters, and review upcoming paper drafts.

events.title: Invited Lecture: Advanced Electron Microscopy
events.description: Dr. Sarah Miller from Oak Ridge National Laboratory will deliver an invited lecture on high-resolution aberration-corrected STEM imaging of 2D layered materials.

events.title: Dissertation Defense: Jane Doe
events.description: Jane Doe will present her doctoral dissertation defense titled 'Chemical Strategies for the Exfoliation and Dynamic Assembly of Transition Metal Oxide Nanosheets'.
